name: Olivia — What Lurks Beneath The Surface
description:
Merfolk/siren POV

Everything was going so perfect for Olivia. A beautiful ocean trip with the man she loves…She was unsure when Forrest took her onto his boat, having never been a fan of the ocean or the outdoors in general. But when Forrest dropped to one knee on the deck and proposed to her? How could she ever think of this as anything less than perfect?

But now Olivia is alone, drifting out at sea on the ruined remains of her fiancé’s boat. Forrest is dead; drowned during the storm, and now Olivia can only think that her own end cannot be too far away. Yet beneath the waves, watching her…is you. Seeing this young woman adrift with no hope of salvation, what will you do?

Will you be her unlikely rescuer? Or is she just your next meal?

So how about that #2025 event, huh? Looks pretty cool. Just noticed it today and was like, “eh, yeah sure just slap it on this ol’ bad boy.” What’s the mystery event gonna be revealed as? Who knows lol
creator: FishTiddy
